payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Close-up of a dark (black to deep brown) leather upholstered chair showing the padded seat cushion and armrest with visible stitched rectangular panels and glossy surface; partial and edge-cropped on the right, with some creasing in the leather, appearing about 0.6 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"chair","short_description":"dark leather chair edge crop","long_description":"Close-up of a dark (black to deep brown) leather upholstered chair showing the padded seat cushion and armrest with visible stitched rectangular panels and glossy surface; partial and edge-cropped on the right, with some creasing in the leather, appearing about 0.6 m from the camera.","attributes":["dark/black leather","stitched rectangular panels","padded cushion","visible armrest","glossy sheen/reflections","minor creasing","partial/edge-cropped","close-up"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.6}
